data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Agent file exists at plugins/dso/agents/bot-psychologist.md
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/bot-psychologist.md
- [ ] Task 1 tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-bot-psychologist-agent.sh

## Implementation Notes
- Read research from: git show 4af34287:llm-debugging-agent.md and git show 4af34287:llm-debugging-research.md
- RESULT schema hypothesis_tests sub-fields MUST match fix-bug format: hypothesis, test, observed, verdict
- Model: sonnet. Tools: Bash, Read, Glob, Grep
